calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion, Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment,
Off Calendar Mar-03-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT TIMOTHY PAUL'S Motion to Set Aside Default Judgment. Appearances: John P. Zanghi, Esq., of Zanghi, Torrres, Arshawsky LLP, (415) 977-044, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Timothy Paul, Defendant in Pro Per, and moving party (415) 928-4745; Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion Denied. Defendant fails to demonstrate inadvertence, surprise, or excusable neglect. Order signed in Open Court(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
